milestones: Multiple distinct agents are assigned by a planner to investigate different candidate root causes in parallel rather than a single agent doing all work

SQL queries are executed against PostgreSQL system catalog tables (pg_stat_statements, pg_locks, pg_stat_user_indexes, pg_indexes, pg_stat_all_tables, pg_stat_user_tables) to gather diagnostic evidence
All five candidate root causes (INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA) are explicitly investigated before a final decision is made
Agents share findings or communicate with each other to exchange information gathered from their individual investigations
The final answer selects exactly two root causes from the allowed list (INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA)
Each selected root cause is justified with specific evidence from query results rather than assumed without data
